title: Chiefdom vs Council
subtitle: Two ways to govern a settlement

pages.text: Once your tribe is established you choose a government. The two early forms are the &6Chiefdom&r and the &6Council&r, and the choice shapes how decisions are made and which culture doctrines you can adopt.
A &6Chiefdom&r concentrates power. The chief assigns jobs directly and resolves Suggestions raised by citizens. It is fast and direct, well suited to a small, focused settlement.

A &6Council&r spreads power out. Major decisions go to clickable chat-votes that the online players settle by majority, and citizens feel heard. It trades speed for legitimacy and unlocks Council-only doctrines.
Some culture doctrines require a specific government. Picking a path is not just flavor — it gates real policies.
